scripts.dev: concurrently -n mcp,bridge,dash -c blue,green,yellow "cd server/mcp && python main.py" "cd server/bridge && node index.js" "cd dashboard && npx vite"
scripts.db:reset: rm -f server/mcp/elyvn.db && cd server/mcp && python -c 'from db import init_db; import asyncio; asyncio.run(init_db())'
